prompt: Hi, I'm an employee earning £72,000. I sold some bitcoin this year for a £4,500 gain, and I have shares through my company's SIP that I've held for 3 years which I want to sell. I also have a student loan on Plan 2. Can you help me figure out my tax situation for 2024/25?

assertions.text: Correctly identifies the user as a higher rate (40%) taxpayer
Mentions the CGT annual exempt amount (£3,000 for 2024/25)
Explains the mid-year CGT rate change on 30 October 2024 or different rates before/after that date
Explains SIP 3-5 year holding period means partial income tax and NI liability on shares
States Plan 2 student loan repayment threshold (£27,295) and rate (9%)
Calculates or explains the student loan repayment amount
Includes a disclaimer that this is not professional tax advice
